name: snmp-syslog
description: One monitored Cisco router (R1) sending Syslog and SNMP traps to a monitoring host (NMS) at 10.20.20.50. R1 runs Syslog at trap level informational and SNMP in both v2c (read-only community CFG-RO) and v3 (authPriv user cfgmon, SHA + AES). Base for the SNMP and Syslog article.

nodes.name: R1
nodes.extra: logging host 10.20.20.50 trap informational; snmp-server community CFG-RO ro + v3 user cfgmon (SHA/AES); trap hosts v2c + v3

nodes.name: NMS
nodes.extra: Syslog + SNMP collector stand-in (real deployment uses rsyslog/Graylog + LibreNMS/Zabbix)
